underlying_goal: Deploy a Team & Invitation system to production, fix post-deployment bugs (RPC endpoint field mismatch, template creation navigation), and hide unused UI features
friction_detail: Initial deployment crashed due to missing AuthModule import in TeamModule, and frontend had field name mismatch (url vs rpcUrl) causing RPC endpoint addition to fail.
brief_summary: User needed to deploy a Team system, fix two post-deployment bugs (API crash from missing module import, RPC field name mismatch, and broken template navigation), and hide an unused sidebar item; Claude successfully debugged and fixed all issues.
